data.content:
Plan ready for review.

Implementation adds one new detection-only doctor check named `nested_caches`:
- New module `src/doctor_nested_cache.rs` exposing `check_nested_caches_at(&StorePaths)`.
- Walks the canonical `.knots/` store and reports any descendant `.knots/`
  directory that contains `cache/state.sqlite` or `cache/cache.lock`.
- Returns `Warn` with `data.nested` (Vec<String>) and a multi-line `detail`
  that includes one `rm -rf <abs-path>` per nested cache. No auto-fix.
- Wired into `src/doctor.rs::run_doctor_at` via a single appended line; no
  changes to `doctor_fix.rs`.

Tests (in `src/doctor_nested_cache_tests.rs`):
- Positive: nested cache produces Warn with the path and `rm -rf` line.
- Negative: clean repo, worktree-internal `.knots` (index/ only), missing
  outer cache all produce Pass.
- Multi-nested: both paths listed sorted, both `rm -rf` lines present.

Acceptance criteria mapped 1:1 to tests. No invariants; no child knots needed.
Single implementation step.
